ValidationError: 'schema:name' is a required property

Failed validating 'required' in schema['allOf'][1]:
    {'required': ['@id',
                  '@type',
                  '@context',
                  'schema:name',
                  'schema:identifier',
                  'schema:dateModified',
                  'schema:subjectOf']}

On instance:

                  'schema': 'http://schema.org/',
                  'xsd': 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#'},
